images.title: Barge ostréicole (Ifremer 00699-81092 - 33290).jpg
images.description: Oyster barge, or flat barge, in the port of Andernos-les-bains: this is an ideal boat for navigating in shallow water, thanks to its flat bottom and shallow draft.

images.title: Barge ostréicole (Ifremer 00699-81092 - 33289).jpg

images.title: Port ostréicole d'Andernos-les-Bains (Ifremer 00699-81081 - 33279).jpg
images.description: In the foreground, a pile of whitewashed tiles, intended for capturing oyster spat.

images.title: Port ostréicole d'Andernos-les-Bains (Ifremer 00699-81081 - 33272).jpg
images.description: The oyster port of Andernos-les-Bains, here at low tide, is home to many oyster farming workshops as well as restaurants where oyster tastings are offered.
